name: bizidea-kickstart
description: Guides a solo founder from raw idea to investor-ready pitch in 12 sequential steps, grounded in Customer Development, Lean Startup, The Mom Test, Divergent/Convergent thinking, and the Business Model Canvas. Invokes critical AI personas (Cynical VC, Mom Test Coach, Industry Veteran, Cynical CFO, Investor in Seat 3) that stress-test every deliverable.
